name: Ettore Bastico
longDesc: Ettore Bastico est un général blindée de qualité argent — Italie. Données extraites du jeu — descriptions et conseils tactiques à confirmer.

skills.name: Retaliation
skills.desc: When friendly troops within 1 grid around you are killed in battle, you will gain the Vengeance status, with attack +18 for 2 turns.

skills.name: Armored Assault
skills.desc: Deal +18% damage to the enemy when commanding armored units

skills.name: Panzer Leader
skills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding armored units

skills.name: Emplacement libre
skills.desc: Compétence apprenable — à remplir via l'Académie.

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Ettore Bastico is a silver-quality armor general — Italy. Data extracted from the game — descriptions and tactical notes to be confirmed.
longDescDe: Ettore Bastico ist ein Silber-Panzer-General — Italien. Daten aus dem Spiel extrahiert — Beschreibungen und taktische Hinweise noch zu bestätigen.
